title: GC Conformance Declaration
description: Governance adoption declaration generated by dxp-init. Records which GC standards have been scaffolded and at what level. This is an evidence scaffold — it does not certify regulatory compliance, SOC 2 readiness, EU AI Act conformity, NIST AI RMF completion, or operational control effectiveness.

gc_conformance_level.description: GC scaffold conformance level declared by the principal. This is a GC-internal classification only — it does not map to any regulatory tier or external certification level.

authority_level.description: DEV-ACCORD authority level for this project

claim_scope.description: Constrains the interpretation of this record to scaffold/evidence state only.

does_not_certify.description: Explicit enumeration of claims this record does not make.

principal.description: principal_id from gc-principal.yaml — links this declaration to the identity anchor

standards.description: GC standards adopted in this scaffold

id.description: Standard identifier, e.g. GC:2008, ONS-1.3.0, GEE-0.1

status.description: scaffolded: files emitted and conformant. declared: intent recorded, no files yet. not-adopted: explicitly out of scope.

evidence_mapping_preset.description: Named evidence mapping preset applied at install time (e.g. soc2, nist-ai-rmf, eu-ai-act-readiness). This is a control-mapping scaffold only — it does not certify conformance with the named standard.

evidence_preset_note.description: Human-readable clarification of what the evidence_mapping_preset does and does not mean
